goal: Run the xtgzpt collaborative work platform through Loop: read project memory, audit current implementation, execute local gates, record gaps, and produce the next project execution state without bypassing Loop.
summary: Accepted goal and initialized task context.

stages.name: intake
stages.purpose: accept goal, scope, and acceptance criteria

stages.name: understanding
stages.purpose: load task context and external memory

stages.name: routing
stages.purpose: select skills, tools, connectors, and sub-agents

stages.name: preflight
stages.purpose: check tool contracts, auth requirements, and execution readiness

stages.name: repairing
stages.purpose: classify failure and retry or record intent debt

goal: Run the xtgzpt collaborative work platform through Loop: read project memory, audit current implementation, execute local gates, record gaps, and produce the next project execution state without bypassing Loop.
summary: Parsed task scope, acceptance, available resources, and repository memory.

acceptance: Loop loads xtgzpt docs/loop/00_MEMORY_INDEX.md and records loaded project memory files.
Loop records all stages, heartbeat, trace, run report, and run summary outside chat memory.
Loop writes project-level action history to xtgzpt docs/loop/runtime-memory.
Loop selects generic planning/backend/frontend skills and does not fall back to finance skills for xtgzpt.
Loop inspects xtgzpt git status before execution.
Loop runs xtgzpt npm gates in an isolated worktree: lint, typecheck, test, build, and smoke:api.
Any failure is classified, retried or repaired according to Loop policy, and written to intent debt or repair queue if not resolved.

goal: Use Loop to execute DEV-009 for xtgzpt: production persistence foundation. Loop must delegate implementation to the Codex writer executor, then inspect git state, run gates, review, verify, and record project memory.
summary: Parsed task scope, acceptance, available resources, and repository memory.

acceptance: Implementation is executed through the codex_executor connector, not by manual chat edits.
Loop loads xtgzpt docs/loop/00_MEMORY_INDEX.md and records loaded project memory files.
Loop writes project-level action history to xtgzpt docs/loop/runtime-memory.
DEV-009 records are written to docs/dev-log.
Runtime business data has a persistence boundary for projects, tasks, chat, AI drafts, knowledge, project memory, audit logs, and access denials.
A restart persistence test proves project, task, and audit data survive API runtime restart.
Database migration assets cover the current collaboration runtime objects.
Loop runs xtgzpt npm gates: lint, typecheck, test, build, smoke:api.
Any failure is classified, retried or repaired according to Loop policy, and written to intent debt or repair queue if not resolved.

goal: Use Loop to execute DEV-010 for xtgzpt: role and permission productionization. Loop must delegate implementation to the Codex writer executor in the isolated Loop worktree, then inspect, run gates, review, verify, and record project memory.
summary: Parsed task scope, acceptance, available resources, and repository memory.

acceptance: Implementation is executed through the codex_executor connector in the isolated Loop worktree, not by manual chat edits.
Loop loads xtgzpt docs/loop/00_MEMORY_INDEX.md and records loaded project memory files.
Loop writes project-level action history to xtgzpt docs/loop/runtime-memory.
DEV-010 and AUDIT-010 records are written to docs/dev-log.
The shared role model supports the 11 Phase 1 roles from docs/PROJECT_CONSTITUTION.md and docs/dev-readiness/02_PERMISSION_MATRIX.md.
The permission model exposes six independent dimensions: menu, data, operation, approval, file, and ai.
Approval permissions are no longer mixed only into operation permissions; permission summaries and policy APIs include approval permissions.
System administrators can configure settings without automatically receiving all business data.
Normal users cannot access system settings or permission policy APIs, and denials are audited without leaking sensitive object names.
Database migration assets cover approval permission policy storage.
Loop runs xtgzpt npm gates: lint, typecheck, test, build, smoke:api.
Any failure is classified, retried or repaired according to Loop policy, and written to intent debt or repair queue if not resolved.

current_status.active_goal: Complete DEV-009 production persistence foundation in the current xtgzpt working tree.
current_status.last_summary: Runtime persistence foundation implemented and npm code gates pass; online npm audit and git diff gate require network and Git metadata not present in this managed worktree.

npm_ci.summary: lint, typecheck, test, build and smoke:api passed; Vitest reported 8 files / 34 tests.

git_diff_check.summary: Current managed worktree has no .git metadata.

touched_file_whitespace_scan.summary: No trailing whitespace or conflict markers found in touched files.

intent_debt.reason: Online npm audit requires network access and git diff check requires .git metadata.
intent_debt.next_step: Run online npm audit and git diff --check in the real Git worktree / PR environment.

goal: Complete DEV-011 for xtgzpt: my workbench, in-app notifications, page states, and responsive acceptance in the current working tree.
summary: DEV-011 workbench, notifications and page states implemented; lint, typecheck, test, build, smoke:api, offline audit and git diff --check passed. Online audit and browser screenshots are blocked by sandbox DNS/browser/port restrictions.

goal: Complete DEV-012 for xtgzpt: production file storage in the current working tree.
summary: DEV-012 file metadata, versions, object bindings, preview/download/archive, inherited permissions, audit and AI file-reference checks implemented; local gates passed. Online audit is blocked by sandbox DNS.

goal: Complete DEV-013 for xtgzpt: knowledge base productionization in the current working tree.
summary: DEV-013 knowledge statuses, human review publish/reject/archive actions, versions, source evidence, permission-filtered local search and frontend review controls implemented; local gates passed, online npm audit blocked by DNS and browser dev server blocked by sandbox port binding.

goal: Complete DEV-014 for xtgzpt: contract closure in the current working tree.
summary: DEV-014 contract upload/paste entry, versions with original text/source evidence, AI structured review, human risk confirmation, revision and second review gate, bounded approval handoff, execution tracking, audit and frontend controls implemented; local gates passed, online npm audit blocked by DNS and browser dev server blocked by sandbox port binding.

goal: Repair DEV-014 browser contract AI review no-body POST regression.
summary: Web contract AI review no-body POST regression repaired. Frontend no-body requests no longer set JSON content type; API scoped compatibility handles empty JSON headers for contract ai-review and second-review. Regression coverage simulates Content-Type application/json with no payload for ai-review, second-review and unauthorized ai-review; local gates passed. Online npm audit remains DNS-blocked.

goal: Use Loop to repair the DEV-015 verifier lint failure in the existing DEV-015 worktree without changing the business scope. summary: Parsed task scope, acceptance, available resources, and repository memory.

acceptance: Repair is executed through the codex_executor connector in the existing DEV-015 isolated worktree, not by manual chat edits.
The repair is limited to the known lint failure unless verification exposes a directly related regression.

DEV-015 approval behavior remains intact: human approval instances, nodes, current approver, approve/reject/return/transfer/add-sign actions, source writeback, workbench integration, permissions, and audit records.
AI remains unable to approve, reject, return, transfer, add-sign, become an approver, sign, pay, or confirm execution.
Frontend remains inside the existing Approval top-level menu and keeps the single 1440 desktop workspace target.
Run and pass git diff --check, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run test, npm run build, npm run smoke:api, and npm audit --audit-level=low.
If any gate fails, classify the failure, repair up to Loop retry limits, or write intent debt/repair queue if unresolved.

current_status.last_summary: DEV-015 approval closure implemented: contract handoff now creates human approval instances, nodes, current approver, approve/reject/return/transfer/add-sign actions, contract writeback, workbench notifications, approval UI, audit and migration assets. Verification is blocked because this shell has no node/npm.

approval_closure_static.summary: Code and docs updated for approval instances, current-node checks, source contract writeback, workbench notifications, approval UI and migration assets.

No new top-level menu is added and no existing business permission rule is weakened.
AI human-boundary rules remain intact.
Run and pass git diff --check, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run test, npm run build, npm run smoke:api, and npm audit --audit-level=low.
If any gate fails, classify the failure and repair according to Loop policy.
